languages.text: "Три разума не могут сосуществовать в одном теле. Помимо того, что на практике такое не смогу реализовать даже я, теоретически это должно привести к полной деконструкции всех трех сознаний. Некоторые менее гибкие умы также могли бы счесть это ересью".

"Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."
languages.original_text: "Три разума не могут сосуществовать в одном теле. Помимо того, что на практике такое не смогу реализовать даже я, теоретически это должно привести к полной деконструкции всех трех сознаний. Некоторые менее гибкие умы также могли бы счесть это ересью".

traits.locale_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

"Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

"Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

languages.text: 「三つの魂が一つの体で共存することはできない。私がその技を実際に行うことはできないとしても、理論上は三つの魂が完全に解体されることになる。柔軟性のない考えを持つ者の中には、これは異端と考える者もいるかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「三つの魂が一つの体で共存することはできない。私がその技を実際に行うことはできないとしても、理論上は三つの魂が完全に解体されることになる。柔軟性のない考えを持つ者の中には、これは異端と考える者もいるかもしれない。」

languages.text: “三个意识无法在一个躯体中共存。且不论实际操作中连我都无法实现此等壮举；单从理论而言，这也必定会导致三个意识彻底解构。一些思想不那么……包容的人，甚至可能视其为异端。”
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

traits.locale_text: “三个意识无法在一个躯体中共存。且不论实际操作中连我都无法实现此等壮举；单从理论而言，这也必定会导致三个意识彻底解构。一些思想不那么……包容的人，甚至可能视其为异端。”

languages.text: «Tres mentes no pueden coexistir dentro de un cuerpo. Dejando a un lado que ni tan siquiera yo sería capaz de obrar tal proeza en la práctica, en teoría causaría la deconstrucción total de las tres mentes. Algunas... mentes menos flexibles podrían incluso considerarlo herejía».
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

traits.locale_text: «Tres mentes no pueden coexistir dentro de un cuerpo. Dejando a un lado que ni tan siquiera yo sería capaz de obrar tal proeza en la práctica, en teoría causaría la deconstrucción total de las tres mentes. Algunas... mentes menos flexibles podrían incluso considerarlo herejía».

languages.text: "Drei Verstande können nicht in einem Körper koexistieren. Abgesehen davon, dass selbst ich in der Praxis zu einem derartigen Kunstgriff nicht in der Lage wäre, würde er in der Theorie garantiert zur vollständigen Dekonstruktion aller drei Verstande führen. Einige ... weniger flexible Denker könnten das sogar als Ketzerei betrachten."
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Drei Verstande können nicht in einem Körper koexistieren. Abgesehen davon, dass selbst ich in der Praxis zu einem derartigen Kunstgriff nicht in der Lage wäre, würde er in der Theorie garantiert zur vollständigen Dekonstruktion aller drei Verstande führen. Einige ... weniger flexible Denker könnten das sogar als Ketzerei betrachten."

languages.text: « Il est impossible de faire coexister trois esprits dans un même corps. En dehors du fait que personne ne serait capable de réaliser un tel exploit, pas même moi, cela entraînerait théoriquement la déconstruction totale des trois esprits. Certaines personnes à la mentalité moins... flexible y verraient peut-être même une hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."

traits.locale_text: « Il est impossible de faire coexister trois esprits dans un même corps. En dehors du fait que personne ne serait capable de réaliser un tel exploit, pas même moi, cela entraînerait théoriquement la déconstruction totale des trois esprits. Certaines personnes à la mentalité moins... flexible y verraient peut-être même une hérésie. »

languages.text: "Üç zihin tek bir bedende bir arada var olamaz. Bunu pratikte başarma yeteneğine benim bile sahip olmayacağım gerçeğini bir kenara bırakırsak teoride bu, kesinlikle her üç zihnin de tamamen yıkımına yol açacaktır. Bazı... Esneklikte uzak düşünürler bunu kâfirlik olarak bile görebilir."
languages.original_text: "Three minds cannot coexist in one body. Setting aside the fact that even I would not be capable of achieving such a feat in practice, in theory it would certainly lead to the complete deconstruction of all three minds. Some... less flexible thinkers might even consider it heresy."
